name: Sim by Dune
description: Agent-friendly tool manifest for querying real-time blockchain balances, activity, transactions, token data, NFT holdings, and related multichain data from Sim by Dune.

rateLimits.notes: Clients should back off when remaining budget is low and respect retry timing.

costModel.notes: Prefer lower-cost discovery calls before expensive portfolio-wide calls.

mcp.note: Dune MCP server. Sim tools will be integrated into Dune MCP.

toolSelectionGuidance: Prefer semantic activity tools over raw transaction tools when the user asks what happened onchain.
Use balances tools for current holdings and valuations.
Use token metadata tools when symbol, decimals, logo, or project identity is needed.
Use supported chains before chain-specific calls when the chain is ambiguous.
Avoid broad multichain calls unless the user explicitly needs them.

tools.name: get_evm_wallet_balances
tools.title: Get EVM wallet balances
tools.description: Return token balances for an EVM wallet, including enriched metadata and USD pricing when available. Use this for wallet contents, portfolio views, and multichain balance checks.

chain_ids.description: Filter by chain(s). Accepts numeric chain IDs and/or tags as a comma-separated string (e.g. "1", "1,8453,mainnet"). If omitted, results include balances from chains with the default tag.

filters.description: Specify erc20 or native to get only ERC20 tokens or native assets, respectively.

exclude_spam_tokens.description: When true, excludes tokens with less than 100 USD liquidity.

include_unpriced.description: When true, includes token balances without available USD pricing. Default is false.

limit.description: Maximum number of balances to return. Default is 1000.

offset.description: Pagination cursor from the previous response's next_offset field.

tools.name: get_evm_wallet_activity
tools.title: Get EVM wallet activity
tools.description: Return semantically decoded onchain activity for an EVM wallet, such as swaps, sends, receives, approvals, mints, and burns. Prefer this over raw transactions when the user asks what happened or wants decoded actions.

chain_ids.description: Filter by chain(s). Accepts numeric chain IDs and/or tags as a comma-separated string (e.g. "1", "1,8453,mainnet"). If omitted, results include activity from chains with the default tag.

token_address.description: Filter by token contract address. Provide a single address or comma-separated list. Swap and call activities are excluded when set.

activity_type.description: Filter by activity type. Provide a single value or comma-separated list (e.g. "send", "send,receive").

asset_type.description: Filter by asset standard. Accepts native, erc20, erc721 as single value or comma-separated list.

limit.description: Maximum number of activity items to return. Default is 20.

offset.description: Pagination cursor from the previous response's next_offset field.

tools.name: get_evm_transactions
tools.title: Get raw EVM transactions
tools.description: Return transaction history for an EVM wallet. Use this when the user explicitly wants raw transaction-level detail, hashes, or low-level transfer history rather than semantic activity.

chain_ids.description: Filter by chain(s). Accepts numeric chain IDs and/or tags as a comma-separated string. If omitted, results include transactions from chains with the default tag.

decode.description: When true, includes decoded transaction logs in the response.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. Default is 100.

offset.description: Pagination cursor from the previous response's next_offset field.

tools.name: get_evm_collectibles
tools.title: Get NFT holdings
tools.description: Return NFT and collectible holdings for an EVM wallet. Use this for NFT ownership, collection exposure, and wallet inventory questions.

chain_ids.description: Filter by chain(s). Accepts numeric chain IDs and/or tags as a comma-separated string. If omitted, results include collectibles from chains with the default tag.

filter_spam.description: When true, hide collectibles identified as spam. Default is true.

limit.description: Maximum entries per page. Default is 250.

offset.description: Pagination cursor from the previous response's next_offset field.

tools.name: get_supported_chains
tools.title: Get supported chains
tools.description: Return the set of chains supported by Sim. Use this for discovery, chain-name resolution, and to validate user-supplied chain filters before making other calls.

tools.name: get_token_info
tools.title: Get token metadata
tools.description: Return token metadata such as symbol, decimals, logo, and project details for a given contract address on a specific chain. Use this when balances or activity need enrichment or token identity is ambiguous.

address.description: The contract address of the token, or "native" for the chain's native token.

chain_ids.description: Specify exactly one chain as a numeric chain ID (e.g. "1" for Ethereum, "8453" for Base).

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.

offset.description: Pagination cursor from the previous response's next_offset field.

tools.name: get_token_holders
tools.title: Get token holders
tools.description: Return holder distribution data for a token on a specific chain. Use this for concentration analysis, whale checks, and holder-based token research.

chain_id.description: The chain ID of the blockchain (e.g. 8453 for Base).

limit.description: Maximum number of token holders to return. Default is 500.

offset.description: Pagination cursor from the previous response's next_offset field.

tools.name: get_defi_positions
tools.title: Get DeFi positions
tools.description: Return DeFi positions for a wallet. Use this for protocol exposure, LP positions, and wallet portfolio decomposition beyond spot token balances.

chain_ids.description: Filter by chain(s). Accepts numeric chain IDs and/or tags as a comma-separated string. If omitted, results include positions from chains with the default tag.

tools.name: get_stablecoin_balances
tools.title: Get stablecoin balances
tools.description: Return stablecoin balances for a wallet. Use this for treasury checks, settlement balances, and cash-like asset exposure.

chain_ids.description: Filter by chain(s). Accepts numeric chain IDs and/or tags as a comma-separated string. If omitted, results include balances from chains with the default tag.

filters.description: Specify erc20 or native to get only ERC20 stablecoins or native stablecoins (e.g. xDAI on Gnosis).

include_unpriced.description: When true, includes token balances without available USD pricing. Default is false.

limit.description: Maximum number of balances to return. Default is 1000.

offset.description: Pagination cursor from the previous response's next_offset field.

tools.name: get_svm_wallet_balances
tools.title: Get Solana wallet balances
tools.description: Return balances for a Solana wallet. Use this for SVM wallet inventory and chain-specific balance questions.

chains.description: Comma-separated list of chains to include (solana, eclipse). Defaults to solana if omitted.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. Default is 1000.

offset.description: Pagination cursor from the previous response's next_offset field.

tools.name: get_svm_transactions
tools.title: Get Solana transactions
tools.description: Return Solana transaction history for a wallet. Use this when the user asks for raw Solana transaction history rather than balances.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. Default is 100.

offset.description: Pagination cursor from the previous response's next_offset field.
